title: Silver Candle Holders Set of 6, Tall Taper Silver Candlestick Holders, Two Pairs of Each Size, for 3/4-Inch Pillar Candle Decorations, Mantels, Weddings, Dinner Parties, Table Centerpieces
features: Package Includes: Package includes three different sizes of 22cm/27cm/32cm candle sticks holders (two candle holders for each size). Suitable for 3/4 inch candles, the undulating candlelight creates a wonderful, unique and elegant visual effect. Note: Package does not include candles.

Sturdy and Durable Material: Taper candle holders are made of high quality metal material, durable, not easy to break and bend, with anti-corrosion and anti-rust function, smooth edges can protect your fingers from being scratched.

Stable Non-slip Base: The high quality soft non-slip pads attached to the base are used to protect your furniture, reduce friction and damage to your furniture, and you don't have to worry about the candlesticks shaking and tipping over due to the weight of the candles.

Easy Installation: Simply rotate the candlestick base and the candlestick cup clockwise against the metal rod to easily complete the installation of the candlestick holder. When not in use, simply rotate it apart for easy and space-saving storage.

Suitable for All Occasions: Simple and generous tall candle holders add more romantic atmosphere to your wedding and party. It is the best decoration for weddings, parties, anniversaries, engagements, birthdays, candlelight dinners, restaurants, living rooms, bedrooms and gardens .
description: Product Description Package includes 6 packs of vintage candlesticks in 3 heights, simply mount the candlesticks to the base and secure them for easy installation and removal. The metal candle holder base has a non-slip design to protect your furniture from scratches and noise. Candle holders are made of high quality metal, durable and won't rust, fits most taper candles (candles not included)
